Sandbox_ContainerAuthorityFramework_Vali: Maximum number of rules allowed for the Validation phase. Excess rules will be pruned based on priority.
Sandbox_ContainerAuthorityFramework_PreT: Maximum number of rules allowed for the Pre-Transfer phase. Excess rules will be pruned based on priority.
Sandbox_ContainerAuthorityFramework_Post: Maximum number of rules allowed for the Post-Transfer phase. Excess rules will be pruned based on priority.
